location: Inside the Ruined Forge of Starfall Past, a small dungeon in Scadu Altus — examine the altar on the dungeon's second level to obtain the sword plus an Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone. No boss guards it: pull the lever near the entrance to raise an iron door, then use that raised door as a platform to jump across to the altar room.

source.name: Ruined Forge of Starfall Past — altar

tactics: Scadu Altus only opens up after defeating Rellana, Twin Moon Knight at the end of Castle Ensis
The forge entrance sits southwest of Moorth — follow Moorth Highway south, then cut west; it's also visible from Castle Ensis's balcony
No boss fight, but Golem Smiths patrol the interior and lava pools cover much of the floor — watch your footing as much as the enemies
Pull the lever near the entrance first to raise the iron door, then jump onto it to bridge the gap up to the second-level altar
lore: Forged from a shard of an ancient meteoric arrowhead that was once part of the Golden Order's arsenal, this colossal blade tapers to a sharp point built more for thrusting than wide swings, still carrying a trace of the old gods' light within it.

builds.name: Strength/Arcane thrust build
builds.why: D Strength / E Dexterity / D Arcane scaling paired with an unusual piercing/thrust moveset for a colossal sword, plus the White Light Charge skill that detonates a magic-light explosion on a charged dash attack
